NestleSHE Day 2025
Module 6
HA

Heart Attack Assessment Exam

Module 6 . Game 1 of 4 . Heart Health

Priority 2
HA

Heart Attack Assessment Exam

Module 6 . Game 1 of 4

1

12 questions, 6 choices each

Only one answer is correct per question

2

15 minute overall timer

One timer for the whole card, not per question

3

+10 correct / -5 wrong

Wrong answers deduct points from your total

4

No feedback until the end

You will not be told right or wrong until you finish

Exam conditions - one attempt only

No hints. No retries. Choose carefully.
